title: Couple’s deaths shock Flenter Location
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Flenter Location community...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Flenter Location community in White Location is reeling after the horrific discovery of the bodies of a 31-year-old woman and a 37-year-old man in a home on Friday 18 July.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Flenter Location community in White Location is reeling after the horrific discovery of the bodies of a 31-year-old woman and a 37-year-old man in a home on Friday 18 July."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Police have opened murder and inquest dockets following the incident. Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies stated that a police officer, accompanying a social worker to check on the woman, was led to a residence in Flenter Location.","html":"Knysna Police have opened murder and inquest dockets following the incident. Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies stated that a police officer, accompanying a social worker to check on the woman, was led to a residence in Flenter Location."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upon arrival, the officer forced open the door and found the woman, identified as Siphokazi Ngwendu, with multiple stab wounds on a bed and the man with a rope around his neck. Medical personnel declared both dead at the scene. The man's identity has not been officially disclosed.","html":"Upon arrival, the officer forced open the door and found the woman, identified as Siphokazi Ngwendu, with multiple stab wounds on a bed and the man with a rope around his neck. Medical personnel declared both dead at the scene. The man's identity has not been officially disclosed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Initial reports suggested the two were in a romantic relationship, but Siphokazi's mother, Nonzolo Ngxwashula, refuted this, stating the relationship had ended before the man's imprisonment last year.","html":"Initial reports suggested the two were in a romantic relationship, but Siphokazi's mother, Nonzolo Ngxwashula, refuted this, stating the relationship had ended before the man's imprisonment last year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Abusive and dangerous behaviour","html":"Abusive and dangerous behaviour"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She revealed that a protection order had been issued against him due to his abusive and dangerous behaviour. \"Even after the protection order, he would still come around. I never wanted him near my daughter,\" Ngxwashula told Knysna-Plett Herald, adding that Siphokazi lived in fear. After the discovery the house showed no crime scene tape, and neighbours reported a foul odour emanating from the house.","html":"She revealed that a protection order had been issued against him due to his abusive and dangerous behaviour. \"Even after the protection order, he would still come around. I never wanted him near my daughter,\" Ngxwashula told Knysna-Plett Herald, adding that Siphokazi lived in fear. After the discovery the house showed no crime scene tape, and neighbours reported a foul odour emanating from the house."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Blood stains are visible on curtains and bedding lying on the floor of the house where two bodies were discovered. Photo: Rozano Alie","html":"Blood stains are visible on curtains and bedding lying on the floor of the house where two bodies were discovered. Photo: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Ngxwashula told Knysna-Plett Herald that she started to get worried when her daughter didn't come home from work on Wednesday night, as she usually let her mother know about her whereabouts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ngxwashula said that she learned from a colleague of Ngwendu that her ex-boyfriend had shown up at her workplace on Wednesday morning, allegedly asking her to accompany him to look for his ID that he urgently needed but couldn't find.","html":"Ngxwashula said that she learned from a colleague of Ngwendu that her ex-boyfriend had shown up at her workplace on Wednesday morning, allegedly asking her to accompany him to look for his ID that he urgently needed but couldn't find."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Siphokazi Ngwendu","html":"Siphokazi Ngwendu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the colleague, despite her warning Ngwendu against going, Ngwendu agreed to go to the Flenter Location residence after work.","html":"According to the colleague, despite her warning Ngwendu against going, Ngwendu agreed to go to the Flenter Location residence after work."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Worried mother","html":"Worried mother"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I tried calling Siphokazi but her phone went to voicemail. I immediately started to panic but at the same time didn't want to put her in a difficult situation if I called the police.\"","html":"\"I tried calling Siphokazi but her phone went to voicemail. I immediately started to panic but at the same time didn't want to put her in a difficult situation if I called the police.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ngxwashula fears worsened by Thursday when she still heard nothing from her daughter. On Friday, a social worker who said Ngwendu had had a few counselling sessions with her, came to Ngxwashula's house looking for her.","html":"Ngxwashula fears worsened by Thursday when she still heard nothing from her daughter. On Friday, a social worker who said Ngwendu had had a few counselling sessions with her, came to Ngxwashula's house looking for her."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She was worried about Ngwendu as she had missed an appointment on Wednesday, the last day her colleagues and family last saw her alive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I told the social worker that Siphokazi is not home, and she is believed to be at the house in Flenter Location. I then told her I would accompany them to the house as the social worker insisted she needed to check on her,\" Ngxwashula said.","html":"\"I told the social worker that Siphokazi is not home, and she is believed to be at the house in Flenter Location. I then told her I would accompany them to the house as the social worker insisted she needed to check on her,\" Ngxwashula said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"After the police officer forced the door open, the social worker came to me and asked if I am okay and if I am hungry. She told me that I had to go with her first. I was given some soup before she told me what they had seen and found. I was told my child's bloody body was on the bed and the man was hanging on a rope from the ceiling.\"","html":"\"After the police officer forced the door open, the social worker came to me and asked if I am okay and if I am hungry. She told me that I had to go with her first. I was given some soup before she told me what they had seen and found. I was told my child's bloody body was on the bed and the man was hanging on a rope from the ceiling.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Blood spatters on headboard/ Crime scene left open","html":"Blood spatters on headboard/ Crime scene left open"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ward Councillor Phindile Petros said that he was deeply shocked about the incident. As an acquaintance of the dead man's brother, he \"would never have imagined him to do something like this\".","html":"Ward Councillor Phindile Petros said that he was deeply shocked about the incident. As an acquaintance of the dead man's brother, he \"would never have imagined him to do something like this\"."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Petros said he was surprised that the police left the crime scene unattended and not cordoned off with tape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I looked through the window, not wanting to tamper with anything, and the sight gave me a shock. The headboard was full of blood spatters and the bed itself was covered with blood.\"","html":"\"I looked through the window, not wanting to tamper with anything, and the sight gave me a shock. The headboard was full of blood spatters and the bed itself was covered with blood.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Flenter community shocked","html":"Flenter community shocked"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A neighbour of the deceased, who wishes to remain anonymous, said that the community is shocked about the tragedy, adding that no one heard or saw anything that could raise suspicion of any wrongdoings prior to the discovery late Friday afternoon.","html":"A neighbour of the deceased, who wishes to remain anonymous, said that the community is shocked about the tragedy, adding that no one heard or saw anything that could raise suspicion of any wrongdoings prior to the discovery late Friday afternoon."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We are a community that stand together, who would call each other when one of us hears or does something wrong. There is nobody here during the day as everyone works. Whenever we saw him, he was always alone. She was still so young and beautiful and didn't deserve this.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It has been alleged that Ngwendu was pregnant prior to being killed, but this has yet to be confirmed. The motive behind the apparent murder-suicide remains unclear.","html":"It has been alleged that Ngwendu was pregnant prior to being killed, but this has yet to be confirmed. The motive behind the apparent murder-suicide remains unclear."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Funeral of Siphokazi Ngwendu","html":"Funeral of Siphokazi Ngwendu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ngxwashula told Knysna-Plett Herald on Tuesday that the family intended transporting Ngwendu's body to King William's Town as soon as it is released, where she will be laid to rest on Sunday. Funeral arrangements for the man have not been finalised yet.","html":"Ngxwashula told Knysna-Plett Herald on Tuesday that the family intended transporting Ngwendu's body to King William's Town as soon as it is released, where she will be laid to rest on Sunday. Funeral arrangements for the man have not been finalised yet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ngwendu and the man shared a five-year-old daughter, who is living with the man's family in the Eastern Cape.","html":"Ngwendu and the man shared a five-year-old daughter, who is living with the man's family in the Eastern Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
